member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WebContentNormalization.WebContentNormalizationService.MultipleLineBreaksRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\n\\s*\\n\\s*\\n+
Explanation:
○ Match '\n'.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match '\n'.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match '\n' atomically at least once.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WebContentNormalization.WebContentNormalizationService.MultipleSpacesRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[ \\t]+
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [\t ] atomically at least once.
